ksa_text: Skill in managing data governance technology platforms and tools, including governance tool selection, implementation, administration, and integration with organizational data management infrastructure.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: skill from Data Governance (affinity 0.65); strategic/implementation framing outweighs governance signals. STRM composite is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch). A Chief Analytics Officer would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 3 match(es) in governance job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Chief Analytics Officer whose mandate centers on policy, oversight, and governance.
